summary: Provisions for holding oral hearings and imposing costs for unreasonable adjournments.
text: proviso shall be inserted, namely:— “Provided further that the arbitral tribunal shall, as far as possible, hold oral hearings for the presentation of evidence or for oral argument on day-to-day basis, and not grant any adjournments unless sufficient cause is made out, and may impose costs including exemplary costs on the party seeking adjournment without any sufficient cause.”
